    • FAQs

      Questions you may have, answered with
      • What display technology is used in the Pixel 10 Pro?
        The Google Pixel 10 Pro typically features an OLED or AMOLED display, known for vibrant colors and deep blacks. Look for specifications like resolution, refresh rate (usually 90Hz or higher), and HDR support to understand the quality and fluidity of the screen.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • Is the Pixel 10 Pro 5G compatible?
        Yes, the Google Pixel 10 Pro supports 5G connectivity, which allows for faster download and upload speeds compared to 4G LTE. This feature is particularly beneficial for streaming high-quality video, playing online games with minimal lag, and faster overall internet browsing.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • What unique software features does the Pixel 10 Pro offer?
        The Google Pixel 10 Pro runs on the latest Android version and typically includes unique software features like Call Screen, which helps filter spam calls, and Hold For Me, which lets Google Assistant hold the line for you. It also often features a Recorder app that transcribes speech in real-time.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
